items.name: Gold 2000s Cheetah Leopard McBling Gyaru Necklace
items.description:
More recolors in group = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611/Laveys-Couture

Drenched in 2000s luxury, the Gold 2000s Cheetah Leopard McBling Gyaru Necklace is a fierce statement piece for true trendsetters. Imagine strutting through Shibuya, your vintage glam necklace catching every flash of the city lights. With bold cheetah and leopard print accents, this McBling masterpiece radiates untamed energy, dripping in sparkles and opulence. A nod to the golden age of gyaru fashion, this necklace is made for those who live life loud, bold, and glammed to perfection.

items.name: Y2K Studded DC Double Rhinestone Scene Belt Black
items.description:
𝕄𝕒𝕟𝕪 𝕠𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕣 𝕣𝕖𝕔𝕠𝕝𝕠𝕣𝕤 𝕒𝕣𝕖 𝕒𝕧𝕒𝕚𝕝𝕒𝕓𝕝𝕖 𝕚𝕟 𝕞𝕪 𝕘𝕣𝕠𝕦𝕡!
Join Group = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611

Step into the 2000s McBling era with this bold, studded stacked belt, featuring silver and white rhinestones for the perfect mix of glam and edge. Designed for true Y2K trendsetters, scene queens, and gyaru fashion lovers, this belt is the ultimate black-and-white statement piece. Whether you're rocking a scene or emo aesthetic or adding a touch of vintage luxury to your fit, this belt brings that iconic early 2000s energy. Shine bright, stand out, and own the look!
